titleStmt.title: SII 22.36: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 36. (A.R. No. 36 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJĀDHIRĀJA II—12th YEAR (A.D. 1174-5)

summary.p: The king claims to have conquered Madurai and Īḻam. This records another similar gift of a perpetual lamp each by Kuḍitāṅgi Tiruvuḍaiyāṉ a resident of Būdalūr in Pāṇḍikulāsani vaḷanāḍu and Sōmattiyan Nīlan Pāṇi of Tirukkaḍavūr by means of reclamation of land at Erukkāṭṭuchchēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu panniraṇṭāvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭup pūtalūrvaṭṭattup pūtalūruṭaiyāṉ kuṭitāṅki tiruvuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyār śrīkāla kālatevarkkut tirunantāviḷakkup puṟamāka
Ittevar tirunantāviḷakkuppuṟamāṉa Erukkāṭṭucceriyil maṇaṟ kuṉṟu kallik tiruttivitta nilattāl tirunantāviḷakku 1 Ittiruviḷakku Erikka Ivariṭṭa muṉṟunilait tarākuttiviḷakku 1
tirukkaṭavūr comattiyaṉ nilaṉ pāṇi Erukkāṭṭucceriyil maṇal kuṉṟu kalli Iṭṭa tirunantāviḷakku 1 Oṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 22.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
